mapper.select: select item_id, stocktake_id, sku_id, sku_code, goods_name, color, size, system_qty, actual_qty, diff_qty, cost_price, diff_amount from gi_stocktake_item where stocktake_id = #{stocktakeId}
mapper.insert:
insert into gi_stocktake_item (stocktake_id, sku_id, sku_code, goods_name, color, size, system_qty, actual_qty, diff_qty, cost_price, diff_amount) values
(#{item.stocktakeId}, #{item.skuId}, #{item.skuCode}, #{item.goodsName}, #{item.color}, #{item.size}, #{item.systemQty}, #{item.actualQty}, #{item.diffQty}, #{item.costPrice}, #{item.diffAmount})
